case_title: BAYVIEW INDUSTRIAL PARK vs. PEREIRA, GEORGE J. et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGE JOSEPH DESMOND, K.LEE/CLERK, P.DOWLING/CSR - CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. SIDNEY BERENSTEIN FOR THE PLTF. THE DEFT, GEORGE PEREIRA, IS PRESENT IN PRO PER. WITNESSES S&E AND EXHIBITS IDENTIFIED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE AND COURT TAKES MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREIRA, GEORGE J. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1004 B-3 REVERE AVENUE, S.F. $4,991.24 RENT, $800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,791.24, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS OF SUIT PER COST BILL.
